meta.title: The Lost Shopping List
meta.description: A phone-first English supermarket game about rebuilding a lost shopping list, finding the right food, and fixing a checkout mistake.
startNotes: The shopping list is wet and hard to read.
Find the right food and finish checkout before the cashier closes.
meta.endSummary: You rebuilt the lost list, found the missing cheese, and paid for everything.

preGameVocab.definition: a place in the shop for products
a list of things to buy

audioPreviewLines.speaker: narrator
audioPreviewLines.text: Hello. This is the voice speed demo.

audioPreviewLines.speaker: mia
audioPreviewLines.text: I need a basket. Where is the milk?

reviewPhrases.speaker: omar
reviewPhrases.text: You need a loaf of bread and a carton of milk first.
reviewPhrases.translation: Сначала тебе нужны буханка хлеба и пакет молока.

reviewPhrases.speaker: lina
reviewPhrases.text: There are tomatoes on the left and potatoes on the right.

reviewPhrases.speaker: eva
reviewPhrases.text: Your app list still says cheese.
reviewPhrases.translation: В твоем списке в приложении все еще есть сыр.

introLines.speaker: narrator
introLines.text: Case one. Nadia lost part of the shopping list.

introLines.speaker: narrator
introLines.text: She needs food for dinner before the cashier closes.

comprehensionChecks.question: What are the first two items on Nadia's list?

options.label: A loaf of bread and a carton of milk
A bottle of water and cheese

correctLines.speaker: narrator
correctLines.text: Right. Nadia needs a loaf of bread and a carton of milk first.

wrongLines.speaker: narrator
wrongLines.text: Not yet. Omar said bread and milk come first.

notes.wrong: The list starts with bread and milk.

comprehensionChecks.question: Where is the fresh bread now?
comprehensionChecks.help: Read the note on the shelf.

correctLines.speaker: narrator
correctLines.text: Correct. The fresh bread moved near the cheese fridge.

wrongLines.speaker: narrator
wrongLines.text: Not the front door. The shelf note says near the cheese fridge.

notes.correct: You found the new bread place.
notes.wrong: Fresh bread is near the cheese fridge.

comprehensionChecks.question: What kind of milk does Nadia need?

correctLines.speaker: narrator
correctLines.text: Yes. Nadia needs a carton of milk.

wrongLines.speaker: narrator
wrongLines.text: Not a bottle. Nadia needs a carton of milk.

notes.wrong: The list says a carton of milk.

comprehensionChecks.question: What vegetables are on Nadia's list?

correctLines.speaker: narrator
correctLines.text: Right. Nadia needs tomatoes and potatoes.

wrongLines.speaker: narrator
wrongLines.text: Not fruit. Lina says Nadia needs tomatoes and potatoes.

notes.wrong: The list says tomatoes and potatoes.

comprehensionChecks.question: What does Nadia need from the dry shelf?

correctLines.speaker: narrator
correctLines.text: Correct. Nadia needs a packet of rice.

wrongLines.speaker: narrator
wrongLines.text: Not a loaf. Rice comes in a packet here.

notes.wrong: The list says a packet of rice.

comprehensionChecks.question: Which drink is on Nadia's list?
comprehensionChecks.help: Look at the top drink shelf.

correctLines.speaker: narrator
correctLines.text: Yes. Nadia needs a bottle of water.

wrongLines.speaker: narrator
wrongLines.text: Not juice. The list says a bottle of water.

steps.title: Get a basket
steps.instruction: You are in the supermarket. Go to the basket rack.

hints.speaker: narrator
hints.text: Look near the entrance on the left.

hints.speaker: narrator
hints.text: Find the orange baskets.

wrongInteraction.note: Nadia still needs a basket before she can shop.

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Not yet.

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Start with the basket rack.

steps.title: Ask Omar
steps.instruction: Talk to Omar about the wet shopping list.

vocabulary.definition: a list of things to buy

hints.speaker: narrator
hints.text: Omar is by the help desk.

hints.speaker: narrator
hints.text: Go to the green helper in the top left area.

wrongInteraction.note: Omar can read the first part of the list.

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: You need the list clue first.

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Ask Omar by the help desk.

steps.title: Check the bread shelf
steps.instruction: Go to the bread shelf and look for bread.

vocabulary.definition: a place in the shop for products

hints.speaker: narrator
hints.text: The bakery area is at the top center.

hints.speaker: narrator
hints.text: Find the shelf with the empty sign.

wrongInteraction.note: Nadia needs to check the bread shelf first.

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Not this place.

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Go to the bread shelf in the bakery area.

steps.title: Take the bread
steps.instruction: Fresh bread moved. Go to the warm bread rack.

vocabulary.definition: we use it for one thing

hints.speaker: narrator
hints.text: Look near the cheese fridge.

hints.speaker: narrator
hints.text: The warm bread rack is to the right of the empty shelf.

wrongInteraction.note: The fresh bread is on the warm rack now.

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Still no bread here.

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Try the warm rack near the cheese fridge.

steps.title: Take the milk
steps.instruction: Go to the dairy fridge and find a carton of milk.

vocabulary.definition: a paper box for drinks like milk

hints.speaker: narrator
hints.text: The dairy fridge is below the bakery area.

hints.speaker: narrator
hints.text: Find the blue fridge with cartons.

wrongInteraction.note: Nadia still needs milk from the dairy fridge.

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Not the right item.

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Go to the dairy fridge for milk.

steps.title: Ask Lina
steps.instruction: Talk to the customer about the vegetables.

hints.speaker: narrator
hints.text: Lina is in the green produce area.

hints.speaker: narrator
hints.text: Go to the orange customer in the middle left.

wrongInteraction.note: Lina knows the vegetable part of the list.

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: You still need the vegetable clue.

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Ask Lina in the produce area.

steps.title: Take tomatoes
steps.instruction: Go to the left produce stand and take tomatoes.

vocabulary.definition: a red round vegetable in this game

hints.speaker: narrator
hints.text: Tomatoes are on the left produce stand.

hints.speaker: narrator
hints.text: Find the red vegetables.

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: That is not the tomato stand.

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Try the red stand on the left.

steps.title: Take potatoes
steps.instruction: Now go to the right produce bin and take potatoes.

vocabulary.definition: a brown vegetable that grows in the ground
we use it for more than one thing

hints.speaker: narrator
hints.text: Potatoes are in the right bin.

hints.speaker: narrator
hints.text: Find the brown vegetables in the produce area.

wrongInteraction.note: Nadia still needs potatoes from the produce area.

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: You need potatoes now.

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Look at the right produce bin.

steps.title: Take rice
steps.instruction: Go to the dry shelf and find a packet of rice.

hints.speaker: narrator
hints.text: The dry shelf is in the middle right area.

hints.speaker: narrator
hints.text: Find the yellow packets.

wrongInteraction.note: Nadia needs rice from the dry shelf.

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Not here.

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Go to the dry shelf for rice.

steps.title: Take water
steps.instruction: Go to the drinks shelf and find a bottle of water.

vocabulary.definition: a plastic or glass container for drinks

hints.speaker: narrator
hints.text: The drinks shelf is on the right side.

hints.speaker: narrator
hints.text: Take water from the top shelf, not juice below.

wrongInteraction.note: Nadia needs water before she goes to the cashier.

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: That is not the right drink.

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Take a bottle of water from the drinks shelf.

steps.title: Go to the cashier
steps.instruction: Take your basket to Eva at the checkout.

hints.speaker: narrator
hints.text: Eva is at the checkout on the bottom right.

hints.speaker: narrator
hints.text: Go to the purple cashier by the counter.

wrongInteraction.note: Eva needs to scan the basket now.

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: You need the cashier now.

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Go to Eva at the checkout.

steps.title: Take cheese
steps.instruction: Eva says one item is missing. Get cheese from the fridge.

hints.speaker: narrator
hints.text: The cheese fridge is above the cashier area.

hints.speaker: narrator
hints.text: Find the green fridge on the right.

wrongInteraction.note: The last missing item is cheese.

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: One item is still missing.

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Go to the cheese fridge.

steps.title: Finish checkout
steps.instruction: Return to Eva and finish the shopping trip.

hints.speaker: narrator
hints.text: Go back to the cashier.

hints.speaker: narrator
hints.text: Eva is waiting at the checkout.

wrongInteraction.note: Nadia only needs to finish checkout now.

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Almost done.

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Return to Eva at the checkout.

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: There is a clean basket here.

lines.speaker: mia
lines.text: Good. Now I can shop.

variants.text: These baskets are ready for customers.

variants.text: The basket rack is by the entrance.

lines.speaker: omar
lines.text: Hey, what's up, Nadia? Your wet list still shows a loaf of bread and a carton of milk.

lines.speaker: omar
lines.text: Start at the bread shelf.

lines.speaker: omar
lines.text: Then go to the dairy fridge.

notes: The list starts with bread and milk.

variants.text: Hey, what's up, Nadia?

lines.text: There is no bread on this shelf now.

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: A note says: fresh loaves moved near the cheese fridge.

lines.speaker: mia
lines.text: Okay. I need the warm bread rack.

notes: Fresh bread moved near the cheese fridge.

variants.speaker: narrator

notes: Nadia took one loaf of bread.

variants.speaker: narrator
variants.text: Fresh loaves are on this warm rack.

variants.speaker: narrator
variants.text: The bread smells warm here.

lines.text: Great. Bread and milk are ready.

lines.speaker: mia

variants.speaker: narrator

variants.text: I am shopping for fruit today.

lines.text: Next is rice from the dry shelf.

variants.speaker: narrator
variants.text: This sign shows today's price.

variants.speaker: narrator
variants.text: Ask the cashier for the full total.

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: There is fresh cheese here.

lines.speaker: mia
lines.text: Great. Cheese is the last item.

lines.text: Back to the cashier.

Nadia found cheese in the fridge.

variants.speaker: narrator
variants.text: Cheese stays cold in this fridge.

variants.speaker: narrator
variants.text: This fridge is full of cheese.

lines.speaker: eva
lines.text: Hey, what's up, Nadia? Let me scan your basket.

lines.speaker: mia
lines.text: How much is it?

lines.speaker: eva
lines.text: It is 320 lira now, but your app list still says cheese.

lines.speaker: eva
lines.text: Please get cheese from the fridge and come back.

notes: One item is still missing: cheese.

lines.speaker: eva
lines.text: Now there are all the items.

lines.speaker: eva
lines.text: Here is your bag.

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Nice work. The shopping trip is complete.

variants.speaker: eva
variants.text: Hey, what's up?

variants.speaker: eva
variants.text: I am ready at the checkout.

variants.speaker: eva
variants.text: Bring your basket here when you are ready.
